info.title: Oriva Platform API
info.description: Public API for 3rd party Oriva developers. Authenticate with your API key as a Bearer token.

token.description: Full token value — displayed ONCE. Store it now; it cannot be retrieved again.

prefix.description: First 20 characters of the token, safe to display later.

400.description: Validation error — weak password or invalid email
Validation error — missing email or password

post.description: Invalidates the current session. Requires Authorization header.

get.description: Returns the authenticated user identity and API key metadata.

put.description: Superset of PATCH — also accepts preferences and data_retention_days (min 30).

get.description: Returns all non-anonymous active profiles for the authenticated API key.
Returns the default active (non-anonymous) profile for the authenticated API key.

400.description: Validation error — invalid profileId format or body

post.description: Switches the active profile to the specified profile.

get.description: Returns all groups the authenticated user created or joined.
Returns members of a group. Requires the caller to be the creator or a member.

403.description: Not a member or creator of this group

get.description: Returns the authenticated user's active profile and API key metadata.
Returns 7-day usage analytics for the authenticated API key.
Returns the user's sessions. Sessions feature is not yet implemented — returns empty paginated list.
Returns upcoming sessions. Sessions feature is not yet implemented — returns empty list.
Returns group memberships for the authenticated user as a flat list of team members.
Returns paginated list of approved, active marketplace apps.
Returns approved apps sorted by install count (top 20).
Returns featured approved apps (curated subset of top apps).

Returns distinct categories from approved apps with their app counts. Note: a second registration of this path exists (no auth, collections-table version) but is shadowed by this route (Express first-match).
Returns all apps installed by the authenticated user.

404.description: App not found or not available for installation

get.description: Public listing of published marketplace items (entry-based). No authentication required.
Returns a single published marketplace item by ID.

post.description: Full-text search across marketplace items. No authentication required.

get.description: Returns marketplace categories as a hierarchical tree from the collections table. Children are nested category objects of the same shape.
Returns a single marketplace category from the collections table.
Returns all marketplace apps owned by the authenticated developer.

404.description: App not found or not owned by this developer
App not found or not owned by this developer

delete.description: Only draft apps can be deleted. Approved apps must be deactivated first.

400.description: App is not in draft status — cannot delete

404.description: App not found or not owned by this developer

400.description: App is not in draft status

404.description: App not found or not owned by this developer

post.description: Updates fields and resubmits a rejected app for review.

400.description: App is not in rejected status

404.description: App not found or not owned by this developer

get.description: Returns paginated entries for the authenticated user's profile.
Returns available entry templates. Not yet implemented — returns empty list.
Returns storage usage for the authenticated user. Not yet implemented — returns empty object.

post.description: Creates a UI notification for the authenticated user.

get.description: Returns active events with optional filtering by category and date range.

400.description: Validation error — missing required fields or invalid category

post.description: Issues a new Personal Access Token (PAT) scoped to the authenticated account. The full token value is returned **once** and cannot be retrieved again. PATs carry broad `["read","write"]` permissions and are intended for personal tooling (e.g. MCP servers).

expires_at.description: ISO 8601 expiry date. Omit for a non-expiring token.

201.description: Token created — contains the full one-time token value

get.description: Returns all PATs belonging to the authenticated account. Full token values and hashes are never returned.

delete.description: Sets `is_active = false` on the token (soft-delete). The row is preserved for audit purposes. Returns 404 if the token does not belong to this account.

404.description: Token not found or does not belong to this account
